series_description: Workpapers and other supporting records used to reconcile and/or reconstruct a local governments financial records and annual reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the scope period ending date

series_title: Enacted Bills from the General Assembly
series_description: Master bill tracking files that include enacted bills and bill analyses for the following catagories: active interest, AOS boards, campaigns, municipalities, counties, crime, FWAP, land, MIS, Personnel, Libraries, Schools, special districts, state audits, townships, universities, villages (include any supporting documentation and notes from meetings).
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years in office, 7 years in records

series_description: Messages received via E-Mail.
retention_statement: Electronic: Rertain until the message has been read

series_description: Record requests for audits released by the Auditor of State''s office.
retention_statement: Electronic: 30 days after the audit request has been filled ; Paper: 30 days after the audit request has been filled

series_description: When a fax is received or sent there is usaully a fax cover page that lists the date and time the fax was sent and the name/company of the sender.
retention_statement: Paper: destroy after fax is sent or received successfully

series_description: Documentation generated or obtained which lead the Special Audit Task Force to determine if a problem audit should be reviewed. Includes supporting investigative work performed on the problem audit.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 years

series_description: A bi-weekly generated report detailing the current status of all special audit engagements in process at the time of the report.
retention_statement: Paper: until no longer of administrative value or superseded

series_description: Monthly special audit section budgetary reports obtained from the AOS internet and annual special audit section budgetary worksheets.
retention_statement: Paper: until no longer of administrative value

series_description: A bi-weekly generated list of all financial audits for which the Special Audits Section has requested regional auditors/IPAs to conduct specific audit procedures to address an identified issue.
retention_statement: Paper: until no longer of administrative value or superseded

series_description: Memos/Directives internal to only the Special Audit Section addressing certain procedural and/or administrative issues.
retention_statement: Paper: until no longer of administrative value or superseded

series_description: A quarterly report prepared by the AOS Training & Recruiting department to monitor CPE credits obtained by employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value or superseded

series_description: Contain Medicaid recipient information with protected health information as defined by the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) OF 1996. Protected information includes patient name, diagnosis, recipient number, birthdate and social security number. The workpapers also include schedules, analysis, transcripts, memoranda and other documents prepared by or for the Auditor of State during the examination of Medicaid cases.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 6 years from the release date ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Reports listing lottery winners matched against welfare recipients. Project terminated because there was little the Auditor''s Office could do to bring recovery of monies.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy upon approval of this schedule

series_description: Raw questions and answers administered to all exiting employees of the Auditor of State's office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 4 years

series_description: List of bargaining unit employees in order by length on service.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded or obsolete ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Equal Employment Opportunity statistics relating to race and gender comparisions for AOS employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 3 years or until superceded

series_description: Contains equal employment opportunity complaints relating to unfair hiring and promotion procedures. Include internal investigations, related correspondence, exhibits, acceptance/withdrawal notices and copies of final decisions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after the case the documents support is closed

series_title: Civil Rights and Title VII Files
series_description: Documents containing complaints and hearing information, ie,. conciliation agreements and consent orders, EEO civil rights files, letters of determination, mediation settlement agreements, and requests for withdrawals of change of discrimination. Please note, electronic forms of the files are stored in OAKS within the employees ePAR.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after the case the documents support is closed

series_description: Auditor of State policies and procedures governing the operation, rules, regulations, and/or procedures of a department, or program, including employee policy manuals and all relevant documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years after revised, superseded, or obsolete

series_title: AUDIT UNIT CHANGE AND UPDATE FORM
series_description: This form (aud-8138) is used when a local government entity changes their name, combines with another entity, is disolved or created. It documents the change, deletion or addition and lists the audit period when the change took place.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: IT Help Desk tickets or incidents contain information relating to employee requests for computer assistance. Details the callers profile, call category info., technician info., and progress notes associated with each incident. E-mails sent to all AOS staff regarding significant IT impact. Daily activity info. from CCMIS (telephone routing system) detailing when calls are received, how many calls are received for each technician.
retention_statement: Electronic: 18 months ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Contain weekly and monthly activity info. from CCMIS (telephone routing system). This info. has details relating to each technician, when they logged in and out of the system, how many calls were received and when each call was received. Includes monthly summary info. relating to when an employee calls the help desk for computer assistance. Includes info. relating to totals by type and technician, mail gateway totals and survey total charts.
retention_statement: Electronic: 3 years ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Includes procedures/service manuals and working schedules for Help Desk staff. Has the necessary steps for completing held desk tasks, steps for servicing IT hardware and software, working/break times for help desk staff.
retention_statement: Electronic: retain until superseded ; Paper: retain until superseded

series_description: Internal information about office issues that staff uses to field media questions and prepare the Auditor of State for interviews.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year ; Electronic: 1 year

series_description: Photographs documenting the activities of the State Auditors office.
retention_statement: Paper: transfer to CD image and destroy after reviewed for accuracy ; Electronic: Transfer to State Archives after no longer needed in office.

series_description: Records related to public requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor, redacted and un-redacted responsive records.
retention_statement: Electronic: 10 years fron the date the Auditor of State responds to the public records request ; Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs

series_description: Records related to trainings presented by the Auditor of State Legal Division, including but not limited to related communications, invitations, staff assignments, handouts, speaker notes, CLE credits, presentation recordings, and PowerPoints.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents authorizing invoicing for goods and/or services rendered, deposits and backup documentation, (billing summaries, delinquent payment notices), receipt or repayments where the original payment was in error. Documents include entity checks, remittances, batch summary and Treasurer revenue receipts, cancelled checks, deposit receipts, deposit modifications, intrastate transfer vouchers for audit services and intrastate transfer vouchers for goods and services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed, destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain 8 fiscal years

series_title: County Auditor Continuing Education Status Report
series_description: Form(s) submitted by Ohio County Auditors verifying continuing education credits in accordance with
retention_statement: Electronic: 2 years after audited ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Details of accounts payable transactions. Information regarding payments made, supplier, agency, goods/services, backup documentation. Documents include Invoices (Accounts Payable), OAKS Accounts Payable Vouchers, receipts and supporting attachments, requests for stop payment or cancellation of warrant, request for re-issuance of warrant, Travel Vouchers, Journal Vouchers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 8 fiscal years ; Electronic: Retain 8 fiscal years

series_description: Requisitions and purchase orders authorizing purchase of goods and services. Documents include back-up documentation, quotes, contracts, and other agreements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed, destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years

series_description: Internal form used to obtain authorization for out-of-state travel for a state employee.
retention_statement: Paper: 4 fiscal years ; Electronic: 4 fiscal years

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel.
retention_statement: Paper: 4 fiscal years ; Electronic: 4 fiscal years

series_description: These documents are sent to the Auditor of State for review. They list retention periods for all departmental records. These local government entities include: school districts, municipalities, townships, villages, libraries, and all county offices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the imaged copy is verified for quality and accuracy ; Electronic: 20 years or until superceded

series_description: Documents, files, or data created, obtained, or received by the Auditor of State during the course of an audit that are used by the Auditor of State but are not necessary for the Auditor of State to maintain to support the conclusions made in an audit report. These records do not become part of the audit workpapers and are not a record described in the Audit Workpapers retention schedule.
retention_statement: Electronic: Until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: Until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Application for One-time Disposal of Obsolete Records (RC-1)
series_description: Copies verifying the destruction of obsolete local government entity records. Each form includes the record series title, description, inclusive dates of the records, and the signature of the chairman of their records commission. These forms are sent to the Auditor of State office and the Ohio Historical Society for review.
retention_statement: Paper: 7 years

series_description: The Ohio Compliance Supplement lists local government laws and regulations the Auditor of State deems potentially material per Government Auditing Standards paragraphs 4.10 and 4.28 and also lists suggested audit procedures to test for compliance with these requirements. The Ohio Compliance Supplement also lists other laws and regulations (and the related audit testing requirements) that while usually not material, the Auditor of State deems important to Ohio governments in fulfilling their stewardship responsibilities.
retention_statement: Electronic: 5 years after updated ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Printing requests received and processed by Graphics Services. These requests are received from all Auditor of State departments and include the printing of audit reports, training materials, office manuals, and special projects. These requests include name and department of the requester, the date the request is received and the date the print job is completed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: 1 year

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Client Data Files
series_description: Includes all data submitted to UAN from client user including annual financial reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: 7 years

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Client Training Materials
series_description: Includes agendas, power point presentations, handouts, registration forms, sign in sheets, course evaluations and annual GASB user end training manual.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded ; Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Software Change Order Form
series_description: Internal form used to document new developments and/or requests for changes in UAN software. Includes supporting test documentation, UAN Software User Manual documentation and correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Internal Development Manual
series_description: Contains information and descriptions of developmental changes to UAN software.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Software User Manuals
series_description: Instruction manuals for UAN clients regarding all aspects of UAN software/hardware.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network User Software Agreement
series_description: Contract between the Auditor of State and users of the Uniform Accounting Network
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years after the termination of the agreement

series_description: Contracts concerning the purchase of goods and/or services. Records include, but are not limited to, quotes, contracts, amendments, encumbrances, renewals, non-disclosure agreements, letters of arrangement, and any corresponding documents
retention_statement: Electronic: 6 years from contract expiration date ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_title: Findings for Recovery records sent to the Attorney Generals Office
series_description: Records related to persons/entities against whom an unresolved finding for recovery has been issued, including but not limited to related communications, certifications, and findings for recovery work papers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: 7 years from the date the relevant audit report is issued by the Auditor of State

series_description: Records related to the administration of the Auditor of State Legal Division, including but not limited to related communications, supervisory materials, staff training, staff assignments, staff evaluations and associated records, departmental reviews, templates, process and procedure manuals, calendars, licenses, logs, bills, and reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: Retain until revised, superseded, obsolete, or no longer of administrative value

series_description: Records related to requests for and provision of legal advice, including but not limited to related communications, research material, legal memoranda, and other attorney work product.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Records related to legal cases involving the agency, including but not limited to, related communications, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgements, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, subpoenas, hearing and deposition materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Manuals produced by the Auditor of States office for internal and external training.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Includes gasoline credit card receipts and reports, mileage and usage logs.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year ; Electronic: 1 year

series_description: Includes service records, operation maintenance reports, warranty and guarantee statements, operating manual, shop-work orders, accident reports and repair records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain during ownership of the vehicle ; Electronic: Retain during ownership of the vehicle

series_description: Includes completed DAS property inventory annual certificates, completed DAS annual/biennial inventory certificates, physical inventory worksheets and corresponding support documentation, annual physical inventory report, annual and monthly disposal/addition reports and corresponding support documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 fiscal years ; Electronic: Retain 2 fiscal years

series_description: Minutes, agendas and supporting records documenting staff meetings including video and/or audio recordings of a meeting
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 6 months

series_description: Copies of news articles from current newspapers and news services. These news clip articles include issues pertaining to: the Auditor of State, State of Ohio agencies, local government entities, national and local politics.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Form used by all regions and departments when sending records to stroage or imaging. These forms include a departmental box number, contents description, inclusive dates of records, and a destroy date which is in accordance with an approved record retention schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: If no electronic copy exists, retain until all boxes have been destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain until all boxes have been destroyed.

series_description: Form used by the imaging unit to document individual project assignments for each imaging technician. This forms includes the audit region name, regional box number, audit period, number of boxes, project name and project number.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: All records from the poster contest to commemorate the 200th anniversary of Abraham Lincolns birthday. Invitations were sent to all Ohio elementary schools and posters were submitted by schoolchildren in grades kindergarten through 5th grade. These records include posters, correspondence, invitations, pictures and awards. This is considered a one-time records disposal.
retention_statement: Paper: 30 days

series_description: Used to track and monitor employee access to PDF audit workpaper files. These logs are used by information Technology departmental personnel to monitor who accesses the GP (Great Plains) system to view audit workpapers that have been imaged. These logs include which audit project and workpaper section is viewed including the date and time accessed.
retention_statement: Electronic: 5 years

series_title: Bidding Documents, RPF''s, RFQ''s or similar documents (purchasing, construction, personal service)
series_description: Bidding Documents
retention_statement: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years ; Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years

series_description: This series consists of a list of questions that is sent to all Auditor of State Clients. These questions pertain to the Clients opinions and attitude about the Auditors Office and allows for comments and suggestions in improving the Auditors Office.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain this transient record one (1) month after they are compilated into a final report. Maintain final report for five (5) years. ; Electronic: Maintain this transient record one (1) month after they are compilated into a final report. Maintain final report for five (5) years.

series_description: Forms submitted to the Auditor of States office indicating updated contact information for recipients of Auditor of State mailings. Updated information may include: name, title, organization, date term expires, postal address, county, phone number, fax number, E-mail address and an option to receive future mailings via E-mail, postal mail or both.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is updated in computer database ; Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Data collected from an electronic timekeeping system to establish payable work hours and attendance including, but not limited to, time of day employee begins and ends work on a given day, hours worked each day, and total hours worked each work week.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Surveys sent to all Auditor of State employees consisting of an employees opinion, comment and/or suggestion on improving the Auditors office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain one month after compulated into a final report. Maintain final report for one (1) year. ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Contact information for employees in the event of an emergency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain until superseded or obsolete

series_description: Job Audit Request form and questionnaire, DAS correspondence and current position description. Series may also include a copy of the job audit notification letter, actual job audit performed by DAS Division of Personnel, and final copy of the letter of resolution to employee concerning disposition of the case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 5 years

series_description: Documents/notes on negotiated union contract language.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain until contract is superseded or obsolete

series_description: Documents and advises executive staff, directors, assistant directors, chiefs, assistant chiefs and their immediate support staff, and management on the status of on-going office activities to include personnel status reports, issues and events.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year

series_description: Table of Organization, charts, graphs to organize the structure of positions within an agency.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Strategic planning documents of the Auditor of States office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain drafts until superseded by final document. Retain final documents for 5 years provided no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain drafts until superseded by final document. Retain final documents for 5 years provided no longer of administrative value.

series_title: Findings for Recovery Quarterly Report Records received from the Attorney Generals Office
series_description: Records related to correspondence from the Ohio Attorney General indicating that the finding has been resolved and a request that the person/entity be removed from the findings for recovery database.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: 7 years from the date the quarterly report is received by the Auditor of State

series_description: An electronic database listing kept pursuant to Ohio Revised Code section 9.24 of persons/entities against whom a finding for recovery has been issued and the amount of money identified in the finding for recovery.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until revised, superseded, obsolete, or no longer of administrative value

series_description: Records include all documentation for the combined charitable campaigns organized by the Auditor of States office. Record series may contain: posters announcing fund raising events, copies of checks/money orders listing name, address and amount donated, related correspondence, brochures, booklets, pamphlets and bank deposit statements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years ; Electronic: Retain 4 years

series_description: Document types in this series include, but are not limited to, Anonymous List/Layoff List (Employee file), Application Certification, Background Check, Civil Service Application, Disability Separation Agreement, Drug Testing Acknowledgement, employee evaluations, Exit Checklist, Fraud Hotline Acknowledgement (HV66), Letters/Correspondence (HR related), Licensure, Certifications, Military Leave forms, New Hire/Orientation/Policy Acknowledgements, OAKS ID form, Retirement forms, Outside Employment, Poll Workers forms, Position Descriptions (Employee file), Pre-Employment packet, Prior Service Form & Information, Promotion/HQ Change/Changes in Position Acknowledgement, Reference Checks, Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Security Access form, Separation/Acceptance letters, Statement Concerning Your Employment Not Covered by Social Security, Supplemental Employment Agreement, Unclassified Services Explanation & Acknowledgement, Unemployment Compensation, electronic or paper Personnel Actions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain for 50 years after the employees date of separation. Separations after 1/1/1994 are stored on electronically ; Microform: Retain for 50 years after the employees date of separation. Separations prior to 1/1/1994 are stored on microfilm
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred

series_description: Agency wide inventory of properties prepared by the head of a state agency before leaving office and submitted to his/her successor in office as required by
retention_statement: Paper: Retained until scanned and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: 4 years

series_description: Documents pertaining to the Auditor of States agency budget. Documents include, but are not limited to: budget narratives, expenditure justifications, executive budget proposals, spending authority adjustments, OBM reports that reference appropriations, internal budget plans and projections, reports and supporting budget documentation and tables, documents that support the development of each biennium/annual budget, documents that support entries into OAKS budget and planning module, divisional budget analysis, payroll journals, budget journals and budget transfer, and other materials relating to specific budget issues during the biennium.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years ; Paper: Retain while needed, destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy

series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Employee Flex-Time Form and Timesheet
series_description: UAN employees use this form to sign in and sign out (lunch hours included) indicating arrival time and departure time for each day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents UAN staff coverage for all aspects of the department including events, support, technical, testing and programming.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents associated with the outsourcing of audits. Records may include, but are not limited to: the Request for Proposal (RFP) tracking sheet; the RFP document; pre-bid attendance sheet; technical and cost proposals submitted by the winning IPA firm; bid scoring sheets; Quality Assurance reports; documents related to the selection of the winning IPA firm; Memorandum of Agreement; documents related to any contract modifications; correspondence related to the IPA bidding process (letter of intent, client recommendation letter, award letter, related e-mails and any other related correspondence).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 6 years from the date the contract is completed

series_description: These documents represent unsuccessful bid proposals for contracts of audits of public offices as awarded by the Auditor of States office. Records may include but are not limited to: Request for Proposal (RFP) tracking sheet; the RFP document; pre-bid attendance sheet; technical and cost proposals submitted by the winning IPA firm; bid scoring sheets; quality assurance reports; documents related to the selection of the winning IPA firm; memorandum of agreement; documents related to any contract modifications; correspondence related to the IPA bidding process (letter of intent, client recommendation letter, award letter, related e-mails and any other related correspondence).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 6 months from the date contract is awarded

series_description: All informal and/or temporary messages and notes including telephone voice mail messages, instant messages, text messages, post-it-notes, routine/generic e-mails, routine correspondence, social media posts, shared departmental calendars, drafts and other limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: The schedules, analyses, transcripts, memoranda and other documents obtained or created by the Auditor of State during an examination, analysis, or inspection of Auditees prescribed in Chapter 117 O.R.C. and/or other relevant Chapters or Sections of the Ohio Revised Code that are necessary for the Auditor of State to maintain to support conclusions made in a report.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain seven (7) years from the audit report release date ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Security Video and Logs are used to maintain security within the State Auditors office as well as assist in any investigative action that may need to be conducted. The security video system captures movement in certain areas within the AOS facilities per floor, door, and/or area. The running date, time and locations are logged into the video system. Screen shots can be grabbed from the video. Files may include, but are not limited to, video, screen captured photos from video and transaction logs from the video system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Video automatically overwritten after a minimum of 21 days

series_description: Prepared for each audit conducted by and IPA firm. Each file contains, but is not limited to, a copy of the audit report package submitted by the IPA firm, a QA report checklist, mainframe reports (printouts) regarding the audit and copies of correspondence prepared by Quality Assurance. If a work paper review is also performed, the file will contain a QA working paper checklist, correspondence to the IPA/Client regarding the working paper review issues, the IPA response to the issues.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years from the completion of the review or until imaged ; Electronic: 5 years from the completion of the review

series_description: Records of awards and recognitions recognizing individuals, businesses, government entities and other groups for outstanding service.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Special Investigation Unit (SIU) case files without referral for prosecution or litigation. These files may include but are not limited to: Auto track reports, BMV information, Business Corporate info, Civil court actions, criminal history report, FINCEN report, Lexis-Nexis report, the original complaint, correspondence, investigative reports, interviews, planning forms and documents and/or other records of evidence obtained by subpoena, search warrant or other means.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 4 years after the decision to close the matter without referral for prosecution.

series_description: Special Audit Task Force departmental meeting agendas/notes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 4 years

series_description: Special Investigations Unit (SIU) case files prosecuted by County and Federal Prosecutors. Used to assist and provide documentation to Prosecutors in upcoming indictments and/or trials. These files may include but are not limited to: Auto track reports, BMV information, Business Corporate info, Civil court actions, criminal history report, FINCEN report, Lexis-Nexis report, the original complaint, correspondence, investigative reports, interviews, planning forms and documents and/or other records of evidence obtained by subpoena, search warrant or other means.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 7 years after the case is closed

series_title: Information Resources Management and Data Processing Services Plans
series_description: Agency IT plans, data processing services plans, strategic plans, and related records used to plan for information systems development, technology acquisitions, data processing services provision, or related areas.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced.

series_description: Documents which evidence the vesting of any right, title, or interest in real property belonging to or used by the State of Ohio. This record series includes Land Deeds and Land Leases which document the purchase, sale or lease of land by all divisions of the State of Ohio and include appraisals, encumbrances, fund transfers, plans, resolutions, Attorney General opinions, contracts and any other original documents related to the acquisition of real property by the State of Ohio. Included in this record series are the field notes, maps, records, documents, papers, and implements relating to or used in the survey of the public lands within the state, which were delivered to the executive of this state by the surveyor of the United States at Detroit, by order of the government of the United States, the records of field notes and other records of papers which have been added thereto, the records of deeds and other records or papers relating to the public lands originally deposited with the governor or secretary of state, and the records, maps, plats, papers, documents, and implements relating to the public lands in the Virginia military district in this state, from the United States land office at Chillicothe.
retention_statement: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Transfer to State Archives after the imaged copy has been checked for accuracy and completeness

series_description: A listing of reports of fraud received by the Auditor of State. These include the reporting of fraud, misuse and misappropriation of public money by any public office or public official. This log includes the date that the complaint was received, a general description of the nature of the complaint, the name of the public office or agency with regard to which the complaint is directed, and a general description of the status of the review by the Auditor of State.
retention_statement: Electronic: 3 years

series_description: Website serving as a forum containing posts from local governments to discuss best practices. Forum may also contain posts by the Auditor of State disseminating information to local governments, and posts by local governments submitting questions to the Auditor of State.
retention_statement: Electronic: Until no longer of administrative value

series_description: List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to: Benefit Enrollment/Change form, Benefit Refunds, Benefit Eligibility Appeal packet, Change of Address, Deferred Compensation, Dependent Eligibility documents, Final Payroll Certification, Healthcare Waiver form, Insurance Enrollment form, Jury Duty-Copy of Check and Subpoena, Leave Conversion form, Over/Under Payment & Financial Settlement, Physician Verification Notice, Tax Forms (Federal, State, City), Union Authorization Cards, Verification of Employment/Income
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from the effective date of employee separation

series_description: List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to: Accident or Illness form, American with Disabilities Act (ADA), C+84, C86, C-9, Childbirth/Adoption, DHO/SHO Orders, Disability Application, Doctor Letter for Light Duty, Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) documents, Hospitalization/Outpatient Surgery Certification, Independent Medical Exam (IME), Injury/Illness Report (ADM 4303), Medco-14s, Medical correspondence, Medical Records, Ohio Employee Assistance Program (EAP) Agreements, Retirement Disability Application, Return to Work, Salary Continuation Request/Extension, Statement of Psychiatric Disability-Psych Questionnaire (ADM 4316), Transitional Work Program (TWP), Workers' Compensation correspondence, letters from BWC, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years after the case the documents support is closed ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: Documents pertaining to internal investigations regarding complaints (harassment, discrimination, retaliation, safety and ethics) and corrective actions taken set by the employer.
retention_statement: Electronic: E - Retain 3 years

series_description: A reprimand that documents a violation of work rules or policies by an employee of the agency.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years from effective date, unless an agreement has been established and no other discipline imposed during the last 2 years.

series_title: Financial Disclosure Statements & Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission "JLEC" Statements
series_description: Official document that outlines personal sources of income, immediate family, business interest, real property, debtors and creditors, investments, gifts and travel expenses and all corresponding documents, i.e., Request for financial disclosure information and receipt thereof.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Internal and External training documents include agendas, registration forms, sign-in sheets, course evaluations including those received through Survey Monkey, course evaluation summaries/compilations, and facility rental information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 5 years

series_description: Routine correspondence pertaining to day-to-day activities of the office. Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos), correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations; requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard form letters, and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: 6 months

series_title: Workpapers Related To Compilations/GAAP Conversion and Other Specific Single Reports
series_description: Financial work papers producing all engaged reports for public entities including governing boards, districts, libraries, villages, townships, cities, counties and school districts generated under the cash or GAAP basis of accounting. Single, small scope reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the scope period end date

series_description: Fiscal caution, fiscal watch and fiscal emergency work papers for public entities including villages, townships, cities, counties, school districts, and college and universities and are used for the preparation of the following: Declaration and Examination for Placement into distress; Accounting Report and Updates to Accounting Report; the Annual review of forecast; Miscellaneous Work-papers as Financial Supervisor and Planning Commission; Termination Work-papers; 5 year forecast; School forecast under ORC 3316; Financial supervisors for fiscal emergency and technical advisors for watch and caution
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the date of termination

series_title: Engagement Letter Arrangements for Local Government Services (LGS)
series_description: All engagement letters arrangements for the various assigned services provided by LGS. Engagements will define the specific service(s) consistent with the Compilations/GAAP Conversions and the Fiscal Distress series of records identifying the year ends/periods of those services. Materials will include letters of engagement (including amendments), client-executed, terminations and all related correspondence (including e-mails) both external and internal.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the engagement letter period ending date

series_title: Trainings, Presentations, Education Reporting and Credit Reviews
series_description: All materials related to the review and approval/denial of Fiscal Integrity Act, CPIM, and County Treasurer education credits including, but not limited to, speaker and topic details, hours submitted for consideration, and application for credit approval communications. All LGS training and presentation materials including, but not limited to, sponsor invitations, staff assignments, topic identification, agendas, workshop summaries, handouts, and PowerPoints. County Treasurer presentation/education will maintain the same as information as above, with the addition of specific reviews for biannual conferences, miscellaneous association meetings, small presentations, and stand-alone online workshops consistent with ORC § 321.46. County Treasurer attendee credit application forms, e-mails and reports are also maintained in this series.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the presentation date

series_description: All materials submitted by entities for the establishment of specific funds, which includes requests by form and correspondence, governing authority for the creation of the fund, LGS review results, correspondence/e-mails to entity with determination. Also contained in this series the maintenance of audit-request information and entity fund requirement inquiry requests and reviews.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Permanent

series_title: Manuals and Annual Local Government Services (LGS) reviews
series_description: Annual (or per update schedule) LGS assigned reviews with comments (either data or paper) of the following manuals: Township and Village Officer handbooks, Sheriff, Uniform School Accounting System User, Ohio County Treasurer, Guidelines for Developing Policies for Student Activity Programs, County Board of Developmental Disabilities manuals and Ohio Association of County Behavioral Health Handbook. Manuals provided to financial officials and administrations as a governmental accounting/operation resource.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: All materials related to the dissolution of public entities voluntarily (pursuant to ORC §703.20-.21) and involuntary (pursuant to ORC §703.201). Materials may include but are not limited to, meeting notes/correspondence, copies of meeting agendas and minutes prepared by the assuming entity, entity communications, financial and transfer information of assets and liabilities, memoranda to AOS executive staff and in the event of litigation, items maintained separate and apart from Legal Division files (likely duplicated).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain 8 years after entity is determined to be dissolved

series_description: Records, reports, and other working documents which detail the annual fixed asset inventory of equipment owned or leased by the Auditor of State. Documents include completed DAS property inventory annual certificates, completed DAS annual/biennial inventory certificates, physical inventory worksheets and corresponding support documentation, annual physical inventory report, annual and monthly disposal/addition reports and corresponding support documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed, destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Retain prior and current fiscal year or until superseded, all discrepancies are resolved and audited

series_description: Dynamics GP is the office’s payroll, billing, and general ledger application. All AOS employees use this application to report their time and this information is sent to OAKS for payroll purposes. This application is also used to produce statements for our audit clients by identifying AOS employees who have charged time for billing. Information is broken down by district and employee as to how many hours each employee charges back to the audited entity and how many hours they have charged to administrative time for each pay period. This application also provides a listing of all entities that are active for auditing by the Auditor of State along with budgeted hours, audit cost, and activity schedules.
retention_statement: Electronic: 8 years

series_description: Include complaints received that are outside of the Auditor of State/Special Investigations Unit jurisdiction and are referred to other agencies or advise complainants to seek assistance elsewhere
retention_statement: Electronic: 2 years after referral ; Paper: Retain while needed

series_description: The Auditor of State official report on the examination of Auditees pursuant to Chapter 117 O.R.C and other relevant chapters or sections of the Ohio Revised Code. The report usually contains the Auditor of State statement on the work performed, opinion as to the propriety of the financial statements, compliance of the Ohio Revised Code as well as other applicable laws, regulations or rules and management comments. Operational Audits as well as Economy and Efficiency Audits are also included in this series.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic copies twenty-five (25) years

series_description: A written policy approved by the State Treasurer or governing board of public entities that identifies permissible investments of public entities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superceded

series_description: These include, but are not limited to, the notes of Audit Managers, Senior Audit Managers, Assistant Chief Auditors, and Chief Auditors that are accumulated when reviewing working papers of Assistant Auditors. These notes may call for further questions regarding appropriate accounting principles, auditing procedures, compliance with legal or other requirements. The resolution of all matters described in coaching notes are retained in the Audit Work Papers (series AUDIT-34).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain while needed ; Electronic: Retain until the completion of the audit and the audit report is released
